The '''Sunrunner zX landspeeder''' was an armored [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] constructed by [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]]. The [[Tatooine militia]] used a modified model of a Sunrunner zX in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG7" />

{{Veh-stub}}
